title: BandShareButton — Invite Link and QR Code Generator
problem: Band creators need to bring bandmates into the app quickly — ideally by showing a QR code that others can scan, or by sharing a link. The invite mechanism must work in a rehearsal space (QR scan) and asynchronously (link via message).
analysis:
BandShareButton renders in two contexts:
1. **First-run success screen** — large QR code + copyable link, prominent, after band creation
2. **Band Settings** — invite link + QR code in a collapsed section

Tap 'Copy link' → copies /invite/[token] URL to clipboard → button label changes to 'Copied!' for 2 seconds.
QR code: generated client-side from the invite URL using a QR library (qrcode.react). Dark bg with white QR modules to match dark theme.

Invite tokens are stored in Postgres (invite_tokens table). Token is scoped to the band but not single-use by default (Recorder can revoke via Band Settings to invalidate all pending invites).
successCriteria:
- Invite link copyable with 'Copied!' feedback (2s) on tap
- QR code rendered in dark theme (white modules on dark bg)
- QR code scannable on physical phone screen at arm's length
- Token generated on band creation, persisted in Postgres
- Token revoke option in Band Settings (generates a new token, old links stop working)
- Large QR display mode for first-run (150x150px minimum)
implementation: components/bands/BandShareButton.tsx: props { inviteUrl, onRevoke? }. Renders QR (qrcode.react) + copy button. Copy: navigator.clipboard.writeText(inviteUrl) → setCopied(true) → setTimeout 2s → setCopied(false). Revoke: calls onRevoke() which POSTs to /api/bands/[bandId]/invite/revoke.

decisions.decision: Invite tokens are band-scoped (not single-use or per-person)
decisions.rationale: A single-use token breaks the 'show the QR code in a rehearsal room and everyone scans it' use case. A band-scoped token allows unlimited joins from the same link until the Recorder revokes it. Revocation is explicit and requires a deliberate action.
decisions.recommendation: One active token per band. Revoke = generate new token. Old token is immediately invalid.

knownLimitations: QR code is generated client-side — requires JavaScript to render; no SSR fallback
navigator.clipboard.writeText() requires HTTPS (standard for production, may fail in development without HTTPS)
userGuide: In Band Settings, tap 'Copy link' to copy your band invite link and share it with bandmates. They can also scan the QR code directly from your screen to join instantly.
